pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states to change label to 'Business Customer'; Drupal Commerce documentation confirms profile type labels can be customized via admin UI at /admin/config/people/profile-types

Drupal address field override system is documented to support 'required', 'optional', and 'hidden' values for subfields. Field overrides configuration structure matches Drupal's standard #field_overrides pattern documented in address module and Drupal Commerce documentation.
Task description explicitly specifies machine name as 'field_contact_phone'. This follows Drupal's field naming convention (field_*) documented on Drupal.org.

Verified via Drupal.org FieldTypes documentation: https://www.drupal.org/docs/drupal-apis/entity-api/fieldtypes-fieldwidgets-and-fieldformatters. Drupal 8+ uses 'string' as the field storage type for 'Text (plain)' fields. Schema uses 'varchar' for string type and 'text' for string_long type.
Task description explicitly states 'Required: Checked (Yes)'. Standard Drupal field configuration property that enables required field validation.

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified against Drupal and Drupal Commerce documentation and task specifications. The task configures a real Drupal Commerce environment (not synthetic data) and uses legitimate Drupal features: (1) Profile type label changes are standard Drupal functionality; (2) Address field organization override to 'required' is a documented feature of the Drupal address module; (3) The new field machine name 'field_contact_phone' follows Drupal naming conventions; (4) Field type 'string' is the correct storage type for Text (plain) fields in Drupal 8+; (5) Required field flag is standard Drupal configuration.
